ndjson_body_analysis.line_format: Each line is a complete JSON object separated by newline

ndjson_structure.content_type: agent-tool-result (callFunction results for fs.readFiles, notion.listUserConnections, fs.readDir, notion.loadUser)

ndjson_structure.note: This is the element at /s/9 that subsequent patches append to

diagnosis.key_insight: Notion uses JSON Patch format (RFC 6902-like) over NDJSON. Each line is {type:patch, v:[{o, p, v}]}. Operation 'a' adds new elements, operation 'x' appends text to existing elements.
diagnosis.warning_delivery_requirement: To deliver a warning, Etap must send NDJSON lines that: (1) Start with patch-start, (2) Add an agent-inference element with 'a' operation, (3) Stream warning text with 'x' operations appending to the content field, (4) Use the same path structure /s/N/value/0/content
diagnosis.minimum_warning_body_example:
{"type":"patch-start","data":{"s":[{"id":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001","type":"agent-instruction-state","owner":"regular","root":{"type":"none"},"sources":[],"trackedInstructionTreePages":[]}]},"version":1}
{"type":"patch","v":[{"o":"a","p":"/s/-","v":{"id":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002","type":"agent-inference","value":[{"type":"text","content":"⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다."}],"traceId":"00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003","startedAt":0,"previousAttemptValues":[]}}]}
